NS Epoxy Flooring Solution is Ahmedabad's trusted name for premium floor coating systems. Founded by Namawar Singh Chauhan, we bring unmatched technical skill and attention to detail to every project.

Our team applies internationally sourced materials with proven techniques, ensuring surfaces that withstand heavy traffic, chemicals, and time.

What We Do

Our Services

Every service is executed by trained applicators using industry-leading materials and precision-tested techniques.

→
Epoxy Flooring

High-gloss, seamless coatings ideal for factories, labs, and commercial spaces requiring hygienic, durable surfaces.

→
PU Flooring

Polyurethane systems offering superior flexibility, thermal resistance, and chemical protection for food-grade facilities.

→
Industrial Flooring

Heavy-duty solutions engineered for high-load zones — manufacturing plants, warehouses, and logistics hubs.

→
3D Flooring

Artistic, photorealistic floor designs using UV-stable coatings — perfect for showrooms, hotels, and premium residences.

→
Parking Flooring

Anti-slip, oil-resistant coatings for basements and multi-level parking structures built for vehicle loads.

→
Warehouse Flooring

Seamless, dust-free surfaces with forklift-rated hardness, installed with minimal operational disruption.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked
Questions

Epoxy flooring dry hone mein kitna time lagta hai?+

Epoxy flooring generally 24-48 ghante mein walk-on ready ho jati hai. Full curing 7 din mein hoti hai. Heavy vehicle load ke liye 72 ghante baad recommend karte hain.

Epoxy flooring ki cost kitni hoti hai?+

Basic epoxy coating ₹45-80 per sq.ft. se shuru hoti hai. 3D aur metallic finishes ₹150+ per sq.ft. tak. Free site visit ke baad exact quote milta hai.

Epoxy flooring kitne saal chalti hai?+

Achhi quality ki epoxy flooring 10-20 saal tak chalti hai. Industrial areas mein 8-12 saal expected life. Hum apne kaam par warranty bhi dete hain.

Kya purane damaged floor pe epoxy lag sakti hai?+

Haan! Pehle floor properly prepare kiya jata hai — cracks fill, surface grind, moisture test. Kuch cases mein leveling bhi hoti hai — ye sab hum karte hain.

Epoxy aur PU flooring mein kya antar hai?+

Epoxy — hard, glossy, chemical resistant — industrial ke liye best. PU — flexible, temperature changes handle karta hai — food-grade ke liye ideal.

Kya aap Ahmedabad ke bahar bhi kaam karte hain?+

Haan! Gujarat ke major cities — Gandhinagar, Vadodara, Surat. Bade projects ke liye pan-India service bhi available hai.
